title: CreateOAuthCredential
description: Payload used to create an `OAuth` credential for an integration instance.

grant_type.description: The OAuth 2.0 grant type used for authorization (e.g., `authorization_code`).

code.description: The authorization code used to exchange for an access token with the identity server.

redirect_uri.description:
The redirect URI submitted to the authorization server during the authentication request
to retrieve the authorization code.
